name: check-updates
description: > Check an installed skills-for-fabric plugin bundle or git clone for updates, show the matching changelog, and provide host-appropriate update guidance. Use when the user wants to: (1) check for skill updates, (2) see what changed, (3) verify the installed version. Triggers: "check for updates", "am I up to date", "what version", "update skills", "show changelog".
author: microsoft
